pages.text: A gemstone hailing from The End, it's crystalline and metallic makeup allows it to be used for various purposes.

pages.title: Where To Find
pages.text: Starstone itself is dropped from Starstone clusters, which can be found in the End - often accompanying various mining structures nearby.
Dropped from starstone ore, this nugget when combined with starstone will create a metal known as Starmetal.
An ingot created from starmetal nuggets and starstone, this metal amplifies the power of Ender magic and is used to craft various equipment.

pages.title: Starmetal Ingot Crafting
pages.text: Combining raw slag and a gemstone to create a metal, how curious.
